known_issues.title: CVT judder at low speed
known_issues.description: Some early production units exhibit a shudder from a stop, related to the CVT's torque converter.
known_issues.symptoms: A shudder or vibration through the drivetrain when pulling away from a stop, most noticeable during gentle acceleration.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive from a full stop several times, feeling for vibration.

known_issues.title: Infotainment software freezes
known_issues.description: The touchscreen occasionally freezes and requires a restart.
known_issues.symptoms: The touchscreen becoming unresponsive to taps and staying frozen on one screen until the vehicle is restarted.
known_issues.recommendation: Cycle through all infotainment functions during the test drive.

known_issues.title: Road noise / wind noise at highway speed
known_issues.description: Thinner sound insulation on base trims leads to more cabin noise than competitors.
known_issues.symptoms: Noticeably louder tire and wind noise in the cabin at highway speed compared to similarly priced competitors.
known_issues.recommendation: Take the car on a highway stretch to judge cabin noise for yourself.

generations.label: 11th Gen
generations.common_competitors: Honda Civic, Nissan Sentra, Hyundai Elantra

known_issues.title: Excessive interior rattles
known_issues.description: Interior trim panels can develop rattles over rough roads as the car ages.
known_issues.symptoms: Rattling or buzzing noises from the dash, door panels, or trunk area over rough or uneven pavement.
known_issues.recommendation: Drive over a rough road section and listen for rattles from the dash and doors.

known_issues.title: Water pump wear
known_issues.description: The water pump can start to weep coolant as it approaches the end of its service life.
known_issues.symptoms: A sweet coolant smell or visible coolant residue near the front of the engine, and occasionally a low coolant warning light.
known_issues.recommendation: Check under the car for coolant residue near the front of the engine.

known_issues.title: Peeling paint clear coat
known_issues.description: Clear coat peeling on the roof and trunk lid is common on cars kept outdoors.
known_issues.symptoms: Visible flaking or peeling clear coat on the roof and trunk lid, especially noticeable in direct sunlight.
known_issues.recommendation: Inspect the roof and trunk lid in direct sunlight for clear coat peeling.

known_issues.title: Infotainment touchscreen unresponsive
known_issues.description: The touchscreen can become intermittently unresponsive, especially in cold weather.
known_issues.symptoms: The screen ignoring taps or responding with a noticeable delay, most apparent shortly after a cold start.
known_issues.recommendation: Test the touchscreen thoroughly, including in cold conditions if possible.

known_issues.title: Brake rotor warping
known_issues.description: Front brake rotors can warp prematurely, causing a pulsing sensation under braking.
known_issues.symptoms: A pulsing or vibration felt through the brake pedal and steering wheel when braking hard from highway speed.
known_issues.recommendation: Brake hard from highway speed on the test drive and feel for pulsation.

known_issues.title: Sunroof rattle
known_issues.description: The sunroof assembly can develop a rattle over bumps as seals wear.
known_issues.symptoms: A rattling noise from overhead when driving over bumps, most noticeable with the sunroof closed.
known_issues.recommendation: Open and close the sunroof and listen for rattling over bumps.

generations.label: 5th Gen
generations.common_competitors: Honda CR-V, Mazda CX-5, Nissan Rogue

known_issues.title: Excessive road noise
known_issues.description: Factory tires and sound insulation let in more highway noise than rivals.
known_issues.symptoms: Noticeably louder tire and wind noise in the cabin at highway speed compared to similarly priced competitors.
known_issues.recommendation: Take the SUV on a highway stretch to judge cabin noise firsthand.

known_issues.title: Infotainment lag with Apple CarPlay
known_issues.description: Wireless CarPlay can lag or disconnect intermittently on early builds.
known_issues.symptoms: CarPlay dropping the connection mid-drive or lagging noticeably when switching between apps.
known_issues.recommendation: Connect a phone and test CarPlay stability during the test drive.

known_issues.title: Brake pedal soft feel
known_issues.description: Some owners report a spongy brake pedal feel that firms up after a fluid flush.
known_issues.symptoms: The brake pedal feeling soft or sinking slightly further than expected before engaging.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask when the brake fluid was last flushed.
